name: Turnover Make-Ready
description: Maintenance coordinates a unit turn from move-out facts through make-ready completion and leasing handoff.

stages.name: Turn Intake
stages.description: Normalize move-out, target, property, and make-ready scope.

steps.title: Normalize turn facts
steps.instructions: Normalize move-out date, target ready date, property/unit, open work orders, and make-ready categories.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize turn facts and identify missing dates, categories, or work order links.

steps.title: Review make-ready scope
steps.instructions: Confirm the make-ready scope, target date, and priority before dispatch coordination begins.
steps.human_prompt: Review make-ready scope before vendor/tech coordination.

stages.name: Coordinate Work
stages.description: Coordinate vendors, techs, materials, photos, and blockers.

steps.title: Coordinate make-ready work
steps.instructions: Coordinate open make-ready work, vendor assignments, materials, access, and blockers. Do not mark ready without evidence.
steps.dispatch_body: Coordinate open make-ready work and surface blockers.

steps.title: Clear turn blockers
steps.instructions: Clear or explicitly accept all blockers before leasing handoff.
steps.human_prompt: Clear make-ready blockers before leasing handoff.

stages.name: Leasing Handoff
stages.description: Confirm readiness and hand the unit to leasing/listing workflow.

steps.title: Verify ready evidence
steps.instructions: Verify completion evidence, photos, notes, and remaining exceptions before marking make-ready complete.
steps.dispatch_body: Verify make-ready completion evidence and remaining exceptions.

steps.title: Notify leasing ready
steps.instructions: Notify leasing that the unit is ready, including any owner-visible caveats.
steps.dispatch_body: Notify leasing that make-ready is complete with evidence summary.
